channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: it's over — 28 replies — 112.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
it's over

Open thread • Replies: 28 • Updated: 2026-03-24 07:30 UTC

OP

They're going to rugpull the entire US economy

Early replies (first 3)

62020090
I think they can keep the plates spinning for another decade, maybe two.

62020123
>$64 trillion baked in
Fucking hell

62020245
eh I wouldn't worry about it

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62020361
>>62020044
the us always has her military to back her debt.
just don't think about how utterly incapable of winning wars evem against the most backwards of enemies they are.

62020374
>>62020044
And why is that my problem?

62020436
>>62020044
>64 trillion
>that's 25 trillion in 10 years
Holy shit the USA is just going to go "lol I'm not paying for that shit" one of these days and crash the global economy harder than the Bronze Age Collapse.

62020555
>>62020044
Those are some rookie numbers.
Japan's debt to GDP ratio is 237%. Us is only at 128%

62020581
>>62020090
this, everyone knows its a ponzi but it'll drag on

62020616
>>62020581
Because what's the alternative?

62020654
Countries without net debt are already setting population caps kek

62020814
>>62020361
>the us always has her military
Not when Gen Alpha doesn't want to die for Isreal and hyperinflation is just around the corner.

62021427
>>62020436
>the USA is just going to go "lol I'm not paying for that shit" one of these days and crash the global economy
guess which banks and pension funds are the most exposed to US bonds
it's like you guys don't have access to the internet sometimes, but somehow found a way to broadcast your retarded post into here

it's amazing how you were able to get past the captcha

62021448
>>62020361

>her military

You mean the sheboons mutinying and clogging toilets and setting shit on fire?

62021561
>>62020044
Stop being a bitch and make the debt ceiling at 50 gazillion. Problem solved, you are welcome.

62021659
>>62020044
If Powell would LOWER THE FUCKING RATES we could refinance and be done with it

62021695
>>62020044
Literally not my problem, you took out the debt, not me.

62023423
>>62020044
>no inflection point
>linear scale
They will, but this train still has tracks

62023427
>>62020044
Debt is good though

62023857
>>62021695
They're making it your problem via inflation (an invisible tax via purchasing power destruction). All of this could have been avoided if past Americans didn't let rootless private banker jews gain control over currency issuance (the FED ponzi) and wean everyone off of precious metals for a century. It all comes down eventually though, the world doesn't want America's jew-printed debt notes anymore. You'd best start believing in controlled demolitions - you're in one.
>>62023427
Debt is Slavery, so for some, yes it's good, for your goyim ass though? Very bad.

62024118
>>62020044
what's the point of saying
>for the first time in history
?
it only goes up so the latest number will always be the first in history

62024312
>>62020044
Please forgive my financial ignorance, what's the breaking point? Where does everything go sideways?

62024879
>>62020361
The US government and ADL are doing overtime trying to shut down the "won't die for Israel" narrative.

62024927
>>62024879
why are arabs and antisemites literally so obsessed with israel? is it like some sort of inferiority complex? why do you simp for sandnigger muzzies against innocent white women?

62024996
>>62024312
when the quality of life for the peasants drops so much that they chimp out

62025047
>>62024312
Just like the fall of the Roman Empire, there isn't really one point it stopped existing, at least nominally. The USD will just keep losing value until it stops being attractive to migrate to the US since their absolute salaries will be low compared to the rest of the world. Eventually they will lose their leading edge on knowledge and technology. At one point, we will see a brain drain OUT of the US for the first time. They will be so poor that they won't be able to afford importing stuff they need for their military. We can already see how dependant they are on imports for computer chips. They will turn into some sort of a big Brazil and will finally split into two to separate countries again, this time permanently. The liberal one will eventually collapse and balkanize, while the conservative one will hang on and slowly die out centuries later.
I doubt these will happen before 2100, and for that reason I still invest in the US stock market. There's a lot of money to siphon out of that place just yet.

62025058
>>62020090
There are 10 trillion in unfunded pension liabilities because of BOOMERS LOL coming due every year.

It's either oyu kill your parents or they jack taxes u to 50% (not on elon) to pay for your parents to keep partying until they have dementia and need a 24/7 nurse.

62025067
>>62024927

62025155
>>62024927
It's almost like aipac bribes all our politicians and makes them go kiss a wall and sell the usa out to kikes or something...

The epstein hasnt got much longer left. People know what kikes think of goyims now.

item.title: My long is about to get liquidated. If BTC guts 70150 then I'll lose literally every single penny I have worked all of m… — 21 replies — 68.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
My long is about to get liquidated. If BTC guts 70150 then I'll lose literally every single penny I have worked all of m…

Open thread • Replies: 21 • Updated: 2026-03-24 07:24 UTC

OP

My long is about to get liquidated. If BTC guts 70150 then I'll lose literally every single penny I have worked all of my life to get. I'm shaking in fear right now. What should I do?

Early replies (first 3)

62024372
>>62024371
LISTEN! Close that long. Why would you want to destroy your account?

62024374
You can't print if you stop betting.

62024382
>>62024371
Look here look listen! Listen pimp, you should probably get out of the position

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62024384
>>62024372
dont worry, no account is getting destroyed because OP is just a LARP.

62024404
>>62024371
shiiiiieeeet hold that bitch nigga dont puss out like no buster

62024457
I dont understand why people who do these Long or short trades would ever do it with money they can't afford to lose. If you lose all your money you deserve it, hope you don't though, but you're a dumbass either way.

62024467
FUCK FUCK FUCK

62024477
>>62024467
post positions

62024481
>>62024467
Close it and long oil 20x to make your losses back and more! You've got this!

62024624
>>62024467
Anon it’s about to go back under 70k. You have 3 hours at most. Fucking close your position you retard

62024770
>>62024481
Needs an update with the US in the coils crying out to the rest of the world for help. This is pathetic.

62024963
BOOM!

62024979
OP are you alive my nigga

62025027
>>62024371
Lose it all...and next time don't be a dumbfuck.

62025035
>>62025027
>>62024979

He already got double tapped. OP is dealing in the real world, right now.

62025052
>>62024371
thanks for playing

62025070
>>62024371

You were too ugly and awkward to ever get laid anyway. Thanks for playing.

62025130
Bitcoin barely dropped enough to liquidate OP. Feels personal. Like they just wanted OP's money, in particular.

The leverage game is rigged. I'd be pissed.

You pissed OP?

The jews took your money.

62025137
>>62024371
Not make bets like this.

62025141
>Longs the actual literal top of a 5% candle with his life savings using 50x leverage
Either a total larp or your money is in a better place now

62025151
>>62025141
does 50x leverage make you gay or jewish?

item.title: Why does this keep happening to us. What have we done to anger Bogdanoff, I jokingly invoked "the biz curse" after selli… — 5 replies — 20.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why does this keep happening to us. What have we done to anger Bogdanoff, I jokingly invoked "the biz curse" after selli…

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-03-24 07:33 UTC

OP

Why does this keep happening to us. What have we done to anger Bogdanoff, I jokingly invoked "the biz curse" after selling and within hours this seemingly dead token miraculously recovered and pulled over 1,000% within days from where it was sold at around 5.5k MC. There was absolutely zero activity after holding for about a week, no updates, no blog posts, nothing and the moment you decide to move liquidity elsewhere it gives you the middle finger and nigger sends. I am convinced that we're cursed, how do we profit?

Early replies (first 3)

62024701
>>62024697
Swap your buy / sell buttons.

62024706
SAAR

62024711
Fuck my chud nigger life.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62024727
>>62024711
same

62025162
>>62024697
just accept the curse and move on. dwelling on it is what they want. you're feeding them.

item.title: Day 248 of snailposting every day until LINK is at $100 — 3 replies — 8.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Day 248 of snailposting every day until LINK is at $100

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-03-24 07:20 UTC

OP

Day 248 of snailposting every day until LINK is at $100

Early replies (first 3)

62019402
>>62016031

62023002
>>62016031
thanks

62025146
>>62016031
The endless nosedive and crab eats the snail. All that's left is a slime trail that never made it and wasn't even headed in the right direction.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: Are normies right, is it better to flex and enjoy life now? — 33 replies — 27.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Are normies right, is it better to flex and enjoy life now?

Open thread • Replies: 33 • Updated: 2026-03-24 06:31 UTC

OP

Are normies right, is it better to flex and enjoy life now?

Just met an old friend who was wearing a Canada Goose jacket and driving a BMW. But he told me he works in a shitty job and lives paycheck to paycheck but he seems happier than me who saves like a scrooge.

Early replies (first 3)

62019001
>>>/fa/ggot

62019013
>>62018960
Luxury cars aren't super expensive if they're more than 5-10 years old. People get too hung up on the make of a car instead of the year. People financing a 2020 subaru are spending more than people buying a used 2015 BMW.

62019020
>>62019013
you gotta luxurymax and go buy some confiscated drug dealer's bentley gt for like 20k. that's stealth wealth while still making retarded/wise financial decisions.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62019021
You'll regret it either way. Such is life

62019083
>>62018960
Imagine the smell, sharp pungent notes of onion with middle layers of exotic French cheese, with decadent wafts of Coco Chanel

62019095
Once both you and him are 60 years old with sore bones and failing health you'll be happier than him because you'll be able to afford to do things and he'll still be working a shitty job.

You'll look back on the time when you and him were young and healthy and you'll think "man, he was stupid, I'm glad I spent my youth working hard so I can finally enjoy my life"

62019107
>>62019013
You can get the entire engine resealed on a Subaru for the cost of 3 oil changes on the BMW. Buying a European car is like buying a luxury dog, the upfront cost is peanuts compared to maintenance.

62019112
>>62018960
I save like a scrooge because I enjoy sitting on a park bench or on the beach, which is cheap as fuck.

62019230
>>62019095
This except when I’m 40yo instead of 60yo

62019232
>>62019112
I recommend gardening. Not a joke. It's extremely satisfying.

62019600
>>62019232
Been there, done that. Too lazy. I love sun bathing though.

62020099
>>62020006
I'm in this picture and I don't like it.

62020262
>>62019600
>I love cancer rays

>>62019232
>I recommend poking around in the dirt

62020300
I actually dated a huge titted blond girl who looked like straight out of hentai manga and she had a master’s on fashion. She chose cheaper off-brand clothes for me that actually fitted me really well and made me look good. Really made me realise how much of a cope branded fashion is when even 10/10s would rather have their men wear cheaper clothing that actually fits them really well.

62020323
>>62019095
My dad felt like a depressed bum when he was forced to retire at 68 (law for teachers). Maybe if you’re some outcast loser, you won’t want to stay healthy and work as long as possible.

62020377
>>62019095
Life in your 60s is not as enjoyable though. Most oldfags regret not having enjoyed their youth more.
Also, most people that focus on saving end up with way more money than they actually need and start giving it out to their kids and grandkids. When you are in your 20s and 30s life seems way more expensive than it actually is because of the house, but once it is paid off, you can live comfortably on a near poverty level income unless you are really bug unto travelling and shit.

62020392
>perpetual poverty because you keep buying things you can’t afford to make people think you’re rich

Yeah OP, that does sound like a great idea. Go for it.

62020396
>>62020377
When you're old you'll be spending a lot on your health though

62020625
>>62020006
>>62020099
Raymond Thoughts and Mind
Hang in there and find God and a hobby.

62020691
>>62020625
that guy is fucking all levels of pathetic

62020694
>>62020396
No I won't
>t. EU
But even then it is still not as much as people think. Also, if you have kids they will surely chip in unless they hate your guts and, if you don't have them, you might as well just accept death if you get diagnosed with a gigacancer or somethibg like that when you are old. Serious health issues will leave you so fucked up that
Both my grandpas went through long cancer treatments and both said that they wouldn't have agreed to getting treated if they didn't have a family they still wanted to watch grow for a bit longer. One of them even refused treatment the second time he got diagnosed in his late 70s because the ammount of suffering to just lengthen his years of decaying health a bit more was just not worth it. Ironically enough the cancer spread slower than anticipated and he made it into his early 80s.
You only really need big money at those ages if your health is going to shit, but those ages are only really enjoyable if your health stays good.
Staying active and sleeping properly are probably better retirement plans than saving big yet people focus on the latter because of how capitalized and monetized our culture has become and our fixation on extending lifespans while disregarding the quality of those years.

62020699
>>62020694
>Serious health issues will leave you so fucked up that
Continuing to live for no particular reason stops being worth it*

62020724
>>62020691
For sure. That image is literally him.

62022513
>>62020625
>Find God
Then why'd not recommend the Bible?

62022923
>>62020694
>heh I won't have any serious issues until I'm 70
You're in for a surprise

62022954
>>62020300
Pics

62023185
>>62020262
>timmy problems
Sorry saar. Next time be born indian.

62023233
I plan to loan Max and just figure out ways to max out credit cards when I'm at that age. What they gonna do? Put me in jail at 75 when I'm about to die. Cool free housing. Idgaf

62023259
FIRE and Dave Ramsey type shit is kind of a meme. There's no point to spending $0 until you're 60 and wasting your younger years being a bum for no reason
However if you ball too hard you'll be a broke bitch when you're 60, which would also suck. So you should have some kind of balance. Think about what's actually worth spending money on.

62023318
>>62018960
>met an old friend who was wearing a Canada Goose jacket and driving a BMW
the real world sounds really crazy
>my old friend wears a jacket and drives a car, should I do the same to seem happier?
lol
if you're asking questions like these, the golemification is nearing its completion, you have bigger issues than having a less expensive car than another golem

62023458
>>62019020
>buy some confiscated drug dealer's bentley gt for like 20k
Is that actually possible?

62025083
>>62018960
No they're wrong.
Hedonism is not a viable long-term solution. That's what niggers do and it obviously doesn't work.
Meaning is a viable long-term solution.

item.title: >online dating is the future of lo-ACK! — 80 replies — 19.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>online dating is the future of lo-ACK!

Open thread • Replies: 80 • Updated: 2026-03-24 03:30 UTC

OP

>online dating is the future of lo-ACK!

Early replies (first 3)

62017513
>>62017496
We already had this thread. Bumble is merely a lesson in why women are retarded.

62017539
Its was just a way to spread stds to a control group of retards

62017623
>>62017496
Are these dating apps even useable on the free tiers? Any time I install one of these you literally cannot do anything unless you pay them some absurd monthly fee like $29 a month. Who actually pays for this crap?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62019192
>>62019188
Zoomers will never know the fertile plains of pussy that were Tinder circa 2013 - 2015. If you were white and vaguely in shape you could sleep with someone new every week with minimal effort.

62019289
>>62019184
>yea she is 18
>that ring
-_-

62019707
>>62017765
If you haven’t realised by now that (the sexual part of) abrahamic religions is just a two thousand year old incel cope, maybe it was always over for you.

62019711
>>62018215
Go see a doctor, you need schizophrenia meds.

62019720
>>62018879
Wtf are you saying relationships don’t always work out?! I have aproached a woman just one time during my entire life but i know the relationship dynamics of humans fully and can say that there would be a dream virgin trad wife with endless romantic and erotic love waiting for us all men if it just wasn’t for those darn jews!

62019725
>>62019131
Kek mistaking you being annoyed when other people openly talk about their romantic success with ”bad manners” just proves what an un-self concious midwit you are. Funny how it’s always mid intelligence people calling other people low iq because they can’t see their own stupidity.

62021049
>>62019289
they sell jewelry at the mall, sperg-kun

62021064
>>62019130
>Brazil
How big were the girl's cocks?

62021075
>>62017623
it's worth it if you're an attractive man and you don't want to swipe a million times for the algo to give you something worth looking at. got my current gf from tinder and I paid for it & I didn't think she would even respond to my message

62021174
>>62017623
Matching apps suck.
Only viable model for avg giy was being able to fire off a message (online approach) to any chick currently online.

You'd be surprised how many guys will pull out there wallet to not even get pussy.

62021180
>>62021174
Needing the woman to pre-approve you talking to her has been a disaster

62021193
Serious advice to all the kids that browse biz. If you're a man that wants a missus and kids, hurry up. Don't listen to those who say "you still have time". You don't wanna get into your 30s single. It's horrible. I've seen horrors like you wouldn't believe. +30 yo females that start crying during the date. They're all fucked up in the head.

62021294
>>62018489
Anon Spain is the kind of place where it is male locals fucking female tourists, not the other way around. It's been that way for decades.
For your needs it is latin america and south east asia that you should be visiting.

62021356
>>62017496
>making a dating app that require women to take the initiative
yeah no shit

62021380
>>62018101
>>62018864
>>62019087
You all are just jealous

62021435
>>62017496
They got greedy, and it's all full of scammers.

62021478
>>62017623
I used Bumble free and I married a girl I met on there.
2 kids as well.
These apps just match you to actual people. I don't understand the seethe, unless you're ugly of course.

62021549
>>62017496
>Dating app crashes when women realize they can just onlyfags instead
Woah

62021571
>>62021478
You must have been using it in the 2010s. It’s all bots and microtransactions now

62022431
>>62017702
I want a virgin wife, though, not some degenerate whore. casual sex is unpleasant desu.

62023902
>>62019161
Oof a random fag makes u list ur life achievments. I got second hand embarassment from reading ur shit brah.

62023951
>>62017496
Time to pick up some cheapies!

62023997
>>62021049
An 18-year-old wearing that big-ass cubic zirconia on her pointer finger?
I don't think so.

62024069
>>62017702
kys shill

62024197
>>62017623
I think I spent about $600 on Tinder almost a decade ago.

It resulted in hookups with 15 girls.
Many of which I hooked up with multiple times.
Some of them were longer FWB situations.
A couple turned into actual relationships.

Even if you assume minimal ROI (only hooking up once) it cost me $40 per girl.
AND the premium features also saved me a lot of time on the app, that's ROI too.
Most of the money was spent in short bursts while abroad on trips when time was limited and I wanted to maximize my pull. I'm pretty sure I'd have missed these opportunities if I wasn't premium boosted to the max and all that.

$600 sounds like a lot of money but $40 a girl really is an amazing deal in my book.
The time sink the app still was is where the pain is, the grind that is dealing with all the flaking and ghosting. THAT is what sucks.

If you'd give me a machine that took $40 and delivered me a fun girl who is looking to hookup every single time I'd pay without hesitation until the end of time.

inb4 poorfags complain $40/g is a lot of money. $600 isn't even, literal peanuts for living out some great sexual fantasies and farming memories for a lifetime.

62024432
>>62019188
These dating sites were plagued with adulterers since the 90's. It was only ever good for people in their late teens to meet each other after 2000. That is where your nostalgia and lack of attention to what was going on with older people trying to find love during those brief glory days. I never tried it to avoid dating someone who was married.

62024446
>>62024197
>spent about $600 on Tinder almost a decade ago.
I agree wholeheartedly 100% with the pay approach and have done it myself, but the issue is that $600 won't get you nearly as far as it did 10 years ago due to the failing company greed and algo changes.

62024454
>>62017710
>indians and other non-whites
Serious question; how are white women supposed to use these sites if they always have 800 likes from India everyday?

62024523
dating apps became shitty because they got flooded with normies

a decade ago online dating was still somewhat taboo, you could pick up some hot alt chick looking a for a slutty thrill with minimal effort cuz online dating gave normies the ick

now every one and their mother is on the app, competition is so high you have better odds RETVRNing to tradition and trying your luck at a bar or night club

62024730
Why would I do any of that shit when cocaine is cheap and porn is free? I can stim goon all night and not have to deal with any of the bullshit of dealing with a woman.

item.title: GOLD RUGGED — 89 replies — 13.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
GOLD RUGGED

Open thread • Replies: 89 • Updated: 2026-03-24 01:04 UTC

OP

GOLD RUGGED
O
L
D

R
U
G
G
E
D

Early replies (first 3)

61998901
Bitcoin too! Wtf is going on!?

61998912
>>61998888
based quads

61998913
Intense bombings that are destroying crucial infrastructure + FED conference in a few hours. It was obvious

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62010070
>>61998888
checked

62010074
>>61998888
okbye

62010178
>>62000000

62010196
>>61999999

62011319
>>62010048
>posts the silver chart

Fuck off heeb

62011372
>>62004017
>I mean the world is on the brink of collapse
People hoard gold for the end of the world, anon. They think the world is ending, so now they are selling their gold. This is the end result of buying gold.

62011388
>>62010178

62013826
>>62010048
>>62011319
Here's the gold one, adjusted for inflation.

62013889
>>61998888
Gold is meant for you to go in-and-out of. It's money. That's why the bid-ask spread is so tiny compared to other assets. Compare that to when real estate rugs and the bid-ask gets blown the fuck out.

62014578
>>61998888
you think gold got rugged? wait until you see what happened to the fiat currency in your wallet. OOF!

62018505
>>61998888
Checked now it rugged

62018519
why they make couns of gold. They should make it of something valuable like iron or granite

62018806
I-I...I haven't checked my porfolio in a week lol

62018808
>>61998888
chinese old ladies were mass buying gold did you really think they were going to make it?

62018880
>>62018808
ouch...
I just bought 50g more of asian gold at 4550 last week because I have the soul of a chinese old lady

62018943
>>62018880
You don't because if you had you'd be selling the gold to a fat western pig

62018963
>>62013826
>>62010048
>posting obvious multiyear long cup and handles
Also, I don't recall the collapse of the petrodollar in the 1990s and 2000s.

62018973
>>62018943
I'm starting to put all my extra monies into chinese old lady gold bars because it can buy me 10 ladyboys and a dim sum when times get hard.

62019090
>>62018806
I haven't checked in a month LOL
It's too hopeless I don't care anymore.
probably gonna kill myself before 2027.

62019602
>>62004017
people soon wont be able to afford food or gas why would they be buying shiny rocks

62019664
>>61998888
biz is the best top signal indicator. That and the moon boys on you tube.

62019685
I hate jew so fucking much its unreal

62019700
>>62019685
we all do...
but I hate americans more, because they have the power to stop them, but chose to obey or do nothing. their freedom is fake and the 2nd amendment is just for show.
3 weeks into the war and NOT A SINGLE protest on the street. fucking pathetic.
Their cowardice, their inaction would soon lead to the suffering of literal BILLIONS of people and their descendant, including themselves.
pathetic group of cattle.

62019745
>>61998888
IT KEEPS GOING DOWN

62019946
6% crash and its just monday, its going to zero, kekaroo.

62019955
>>61998888
So much for $10,000.oo gold lol

62019957
I feel nothing but an intense hatred for Trump.
The orange retard would rather nuke Iran than disobey Israel.

62020897
Why is it growing again? FFS I don t get anything

62020914
>>61999090
Western Russia used to be part of a very gay country.
The gold price was driven by chinese speculation

62024363
>>62019745
>KEEPS GOING DOWN
lol
I'm torn because I want everyone on /biz/ to make money, but I also want the arrogant, smug, condescending gold dudes to shut the fuck up.

item.title: >DUDE, AI is definitely going to replace all of our jobs! — 14 replies — 11.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>DUDE, AI is definitely going to replace all of our jobs!

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-03-24 06:26 UTC

OP

>DUDE, AI is definitely going to replace all of our jobs!
>What do you mean the only employers are Walmart and Door dash?
>What do you mean having universal basic income means I have to go to war?

Early replies (first 3)

62024627
The "UBI" narrative is about one thing and one thing alone, the 300T that BoomerX legitimated polity has put the world in a hole and preventing subsidized socialists getting strung up next to polity and bureaucracy.
Its going to be half assed, exploited and ultimately finance the steinging up of socialists, polity and bureaucracy.

No, nobody in the past 80 years and until the genocide materializes is going to be forgotten; you are in a parliament, you got subsidized by the future, you and your family die

62024684
>>62024176
a machine needs a human
but machine with ai doesn't need human or at least most of them, just a dedicated group of ai coders would be enough

62024758
>>62024684
>but machine with ai doesn't need human
Really not what AI has shown.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62024783
>>62024758
Nah, like 70% of white collar jobs are bullshit pretend work anyway and there are zero consequences to just making shit up. All of those jobs can easily be replaced by AI.

62024815
>>62024783
now imagine if blue collar jobs will be replaced with crude made machines with ai chips
95% of Humanity in developed contries will be left to starve as there will be no need for them
I'd imagine common people will have to return to being peasants to survive

62024818
>>62024176
Glad, that I own the means of production via stonks.

62024825
>>62024815
But that already happened and nobody cares. If you look at the total labour-hours used to produce the necessities the average human needs to live it works out to like an hour of labour per week per citizen. The other 39 hours are spent on useless corpo jobs that produce almost nothing of real value. When AI replaces people at doing some bullshit task that nobody actually cares about people will just find some new bullshit task to do that AI can't replace them at.

62024832
>>62024815
Isn’t that why UBI was created as a concept? You can't avoid automation and only so many jobs can be made in theory.

62024833
Unironically I'm gonna get into vibbe coding and buy a 3d printer for this reason. With the new tech you can technically BE your own business, you just need to find a fucking niche.

62024976
>>62024815
>>62024825
Machines have already replaced all of the work machines can reasonably do. Factory lines don't usually have welders or press operators or mold handlers anymore, machines can do that because they're highly repeatable tasks.
Right now the holy grail of robotics is accurately and smoothly replicating the functionality of a human hand. Walking and general movement is a solved problem, and when you think about it from a physics perspective it's actually not that hard. You hand, on the other hand, is a mess of joints and tendons that need to operate perfectly to perform anything from surgery to playing a violin concerto. Combine that with the need for a high degree of visual-hand coordination and you're beyond the limits of modern technology. Most remaining blue collar jobs like plumber or electrician require extreme dexterity and high visual acuity which machines are still very far away from.

62024983
I meant full-on robots, like terminators

62025046
>>62024176
imagine being the 19 year old that wrote that

62025064
>>62024976
>Walking and general movement is a solved problem
Not fully since batteries are shit compared to human metabolism. I can eat a snickers while working in a coal mine. A robot will have to be recharged or have its battery swapped every few hours.
>muh fast charging
Ah yes let me build high voltage chargers in the middle of a coal mine lol.
Also a human won't catch fire and explode if it gets injured.

62025073
>>62024815
You could create jobs that currently wouldn't make financial sense with UBI. Like picking up trash in a forest, other nature related things. Civil service type stuff.

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 101 replies — 8.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 101 • Updated: 2026-03-23 19:45 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61998660
>>61932834

This shit is going to 100 dollars isnt it

61998672
>>61997626
Oh shit anon. We should've told you that if YOU buy then it's going to 0$. You should sell and then after you sell we'll GIGA ULTRA MEGA PUMP to 100$+

61998866
>>61998660
Yes. Yes it is

61999089
>>61998866
Did you buy?

62000247
>>61999089
Of course. 100 DOT holder reporting in

62000433
>>62000247
It's over guys. This guy doomed us. Because he bought it's going to 0$. Please sell before I put my DOT into my cars brakes.

62004150
>>62000247
The moment you bough the whole market started dumping.

62007000
100$ end of bull run. Is it possible to keep the thread alive for 1 full month? 15 days to go!

62007009
How much are they paying you jeets to post here?

62007046
>>62007009
Well... The question is... How much do you want to get paid to jeet like we do? We can easily mog your jobs salary. JEETMAXXING

62007254
>>62007009
Zero. Plus im white

62008295
>>62007254
Good one dear fren Rajakesh Pujakistan. That'll convince him. Now post your white hand with a timestamp. Picrel is me and my white hand sar

62010139
So... When's JAM coming out guys? Those fuckers stopped doing the monthly development calls

62010191
>>62010139
If you're not a bot, here's a question: why constantly humiliate yourself in public like this? It's embarrassing. Nobody cares about the pedochain and Gayvin.

62010262
>>62010191
I'm really glad you brought that up anon. Great question! And if I want to answer it properly, like you deserve, my good sar, then I'll need a bit more information
>why constantly humiliate yourself in public like this? It's embarrassing. Nobody cares about the pedochain and Gayvin.
What do you mean by constantly humiliate myself? Can you help me understand that

62011878
100$ end of bull run

62014468
You did notice that the activity is actually up by a large % since Acurast launched their corechains (https://data.parity.io/parachain-stats?selection-mode=include&frequency=daily), right guys?

62014587
>>62010191
False rumor about Gavin

62015928
>>62014587
Don't lie. Why do you think they call him WOOD? And he literally looks like a 7yo boy pedo, just look at him. If I googled "Pedophile" then Gavins picture would probably be #2, right after Epstein. And since we're talking about Epstein... Gavin and Epstein were partying all the time together.

62016012
>>62015928
Oh shit. You are a bot

62016043
>>62016012
Could a bot post pictures of his hands with a timestamp? Like I did here; >>62008295 ??? Makes no sense, right?

62016887
>>62016043
So are you for DOT or not

62016901
>>62016887
What do you mean by FOR? Could you define that a little bit more?

62016960
>>61932834
How does a thread with only 94 posts from 20 days ago exist? Dot fag must be bumping it everyday when it hits page 10.

62016999
>>62016960
Read this >>62007000
Also. This is now a DOT board. /biz/ was always a DOT board

62019865
100$ end of bull run

62019872
>>62019865
75

62020329
>>62019872
Dear Punjabista Rajakesh

We talked about this. I first write 100$ and then after it reaches the 9th page you bump the thread and you write 75$. Don't bump the thread before that or Gavin won't pay us DOT for shilling this project.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62021618
>>62016901
What's so hard to understand? Do you support the project?

62023262
>>62021618
>Do you support the project?
In what way? I don't support every decision of the project I guess... But as a whole I really do believe it's the one of the ONLY cryptos worth while. The thing is... Most people don't care about decentralization as a whole and that's why the sector is, in a sense, going under. People got to greedy and lost their roots. Everyone just wants a quick x100 meme coin and that's a big part of the reason there literally was no bull run outside of BTC and a few select meme scam coins. People always destroy everything. It just is how it is. The thing is though. People won't be able to ignore DOT forever. It is what ETH literally wants to be. It has EVERYTHING ETH wants to have in the next 10-15 year. And JAM will probably hit some time this year.

item.title: I never imagined going from a virgin NEET loser in my early 20s to getting married, 2 kids, good job, 2 houses only to l… — 6 replies — 7.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
I never imagined going from a virgin NEET loser in my early 20s to getting married, 2 kids, good job, 2 houses only to l…

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-03-24 06:57 UTC

OP

I never imagined going from a virgin NEET loser in my early 20s to getting married, 2 kids, good job, 2 houses only to lose it all and back to being a piece of shit NEET turning 35.

Early replies (first 3)

62025077
>>62025071
my father also lost it all and I grew up malnourished.
Why the fuck do you have us, if your life isn't stable, fathers?

62025091
>>62025077

Women's lib destabilized the family. Blame your mom.

62025092
>>62025071
I'm sorry for you, anon. Whatever you do, just don't become an alcoholic or anything. Stay healthy.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62025100
>>62025077
>> imprint of Freud's agenda
>> blames parents for self-indulgence

Can you predict the market? No!? The world is dynamic. Do you know what it takes to grow a family?

62025114
>>62025071
Neet sounds preferable tbdesu. Although hopefully you didn’t blow thru all your money/assets…

62025118
>>62025071
born2neet this life is a psyop

item.title: Nobody wants to buy NYC mansions or townhomes anymore. — 35 replies — 7.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Nobody wants to buy NYC mansions or townhomes anymore.

Open thread • Replies: 35 • Updated: 2026-03-24 02:54 UTC

OP

Nobody wants to buy NYC mansions or townhomes anymore.
>at the $15 million and up price point the preference is doorman style apartment buildings, especially if this is a residence and not an investment
Why?

Early replies (first 3)

62013834
Tartaria..

62013851
>>62013830
All the ultra luxury housing in NY is speculative investment. No one lives in those fancy new high rises much less in these "mansions".

62013855
why don't the sellers lower the price

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62014132
why are people not lining up for the nyc mansions? do they truly prefer 300sqft studios?
it's hard to understand people. a mystery really

62014160
>>62013830
Panic room sure was a movie.

62014163
Security.

62014184
For people with that much money, jurisdiction matters more than location.

62014197
>>62013830
Give me $50M and I'll buy one

62014199
>>62014169
rich liberals love the hustle and the bustle
doubt theres any bums loitering around there

62014207
>>62014197
If someone gives you $50M now, you will try to gamble it on shitcoins, you know, to double it. And lose it all to a DEX scam.

62014208
>>62014169
>>62014099
Trying to decide if I want to explain or if I just trust my instincts that these are Israeli glowies.

62014566
>>62013830
> old
> over priced
> falling apart
> require substantial renovations
> cheaper and better options available pretty much anywhere else
> crowded, high property tax area
it really is a mystery isn't it?

62014765
>>62013830
N.

62015476
NYC is a brasil-level shithole to europeans these days. We’d rather livd in the hustle and bustle of our own european cities.

62015477
>>62014099
Yeah exactly, to european standards the metro is fucking ancient and in a very decayed condition.

62015485
>>62014199
Read >>62015476 there are way better cities for hustle and bustle these days. Somehow despite americans living in hyper violent cities with poor infrastructure, their night life is pretty tame and behind in trends compared to europe’s big cities.

62015603
>>62013830
looks like some gangbangers could easily kill you with a driveby shooting and you already put a target on your back buying it

62015736
>>62013874
This, likely. Boomers are in denial that no one can afford their overpriced real estate.

62015742
New york city is really, really crowded. It's hard to move around, either walking, driving, or subway. With that swell comes a lot of noise, dirt, and unpleasant encounters with foreigners.

62018124
>>62014169
Jewyorkers like to visit art galeries, go to theatre, concerts, trendy bars, nightclubs, restaurants...

62018156
>>62018124
Those are literally everywhere.

62022891
Why do chuds laser-focus on the least violent city in the US to talk about crime? NYC is famously much safer than other metros.

62022913
>>62014169
>"New york is the best city in the world"
-someone who's never been to like Tokyo or barcelona or Hong kong or ...

62022968
>>62015742
>really, really crowded
Lol have you been there at all in the past 6 years? There's nobody there except the poors that couldn't afford to leave. Everybody that's still there was just faking it until they made it, which is incredibly shitty advice that stopped being useful 20 years ago. The bridge and tunnel crowd is the only thing keeping it from going under.

62022987
>>62013830
>why aren't richfags buying mansions in a city where the mayor explicitly wants to tax them (and everyone else) to death?!?

62023570
>>62013830
Why is that image so weirdly dark?

62023591
>>62023570
op blocked by the paywall below

62023592
>>62023570
Socio-economic factors.

62024002
>>62023570
Steiny vibes.

62024023
>>62014099
maybe you're foreign or just a hick, but rich people don't use the subway

62024577
>>62013830
Stop posting paywall articles

62024616
>>62024023
Rich people also probably prefer a high rise penthouse or multi floor condo over a street level townhouse in plain view of the street riff raff.

62024673
>>62013830
it's because Mamdani wants to shit diarrhea all over millionaires. Surprise, then millionaires leave for Florida and other based states. whoops. I guess socialism is fucking retarded and doesn't work.

item.title: Dont do meth + trade boys — 17 replies — 7.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Dont do meth + trade boys

Open thread • Replies: 17 • Updated: 2026-03-24 05:19 UTC

OP

Last year october, while I was eating meth all day everyday i decided to put 500k (my entire lfiesavings) all on ETH.. I am now down to about 200k and its not looking great.

Learn from me gentlemen. I am now genuinely considering those switzerland assisted euthanasia pods if things dont go up soon

Early replies (first 3)

62024576
>>62024567
yikes

62024595
Just don't become an addict. Alcohol, drugs... I was an alcoholic for 10 years and it ruined my life.

Funny thing, I became an alcoholic for being a wagie. I got the night shift because the salary is good and became unable to sleep. I just couldn't sleep. Started drinking to sleep. Then one day I threatened my boss (alcohol rage). Now, I'm not a wagie and I'm not an alcoholic. I'm nothing.

62024602
>>62024567
>eating meth all day everyday
the fuck? I do the same, 90% racemic p2p based methamphetamine hydrochloride

5-25mg a day. im dying.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62024612
>>62024602
Get some xanax and seroquel and sleep for 3 days

Do yall have the voices? I thought the cartel put a microchip in my brain and was driving me insane before they tortured me to death when I was smoking meth.

62024630
>>62024612
>before they tortured me to death when I was smoking meth.
tell me more anon

the worst ive gotten was bad psychedelic-like visual hallucinations and i always took that as a sign to pop xanax and sleep ASAP

62024635
>>62024630
>bad psychedelic-like visual hallucinations
I got that after 5 days of not sleeping. like visual static.

then I heard a siren in my house. (there is no siren in my house). I went straight to bed and didnt look at anything in the dark and sang in my head because I could no longer trust what I could hear or see.

62024639
>>62024567
>>62024630
to honor this thread im gonna do another 12mg, bless up bro. never smoking this shit but daaammmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmm

62024659
>>62024635
>I got that after 5 days of not sleeping. like visual static.

It was more than static for me. For me, it was like the bright highlights of objects trailed along when i moved my sight - like the outline of the last object was glowing and following where i looked

62024665
>>62024567
going all-in on one investment is already retarded, but going all-in on one shitcoin is fucking braindead

62024666
>>62024635
>I went straight to bed and didnt look at anything in the dark
Goddamn nigga thats some silent hill shit

62024669
My portfolio is 50% MSFT and 50% SPY. I’m down to ~$700,000 from a little over million. Not quite the same, but still a pretty miserable wait.

62024762
>>62024567
Only a tweaker would buy into
>uptober

62024830
>>62024567
Contrary to popular belief Ritalin doesn’t make you a genius. But it will accelerate your present tendencies. Especially if you’re retarded

62024929
>>62024666
>Goddamn nigga thats some silent hill shit
satan digits

seriously though you know what im talking about. there was NO WAY IN FUCKING HELL im gonna look at the dark corner in my room if im aware im hallucinating, I couldn't help but notice strange squirming centipede like creatures on my desk that would go away if I looked close enough. there was no fucking way I was gonna investigate. When I woke up everything was fine.

>>62024659
>t was like the bright highlights of objects trailed along when i moved my sight
interesting. for me it was like... a literal movie like filter, like webs just popping in and out and scattered like art, i knew it was a hallucination because it made no medical sense.

The outline of the last object glowing and following sounds like some video game physics engine glitch. nutty.

62024931
>>62024666
>>62024639
>another 12mg
by the way I did this. no heart palpitations and my hands arent blue yet. might do another 7mg IDK though, lmk

62024945
>>62024567
I thought the purpose of meth was all-day sex orgies

62024956
>>62024945
honestly bro I get fucking annoyed when I get horny on meth, you get ultra horny just eating it too; I can't imagine the people who fucking smoke it or whatever other ROA. Like wanting to just fuck NOW or jack off NOW, you have to either get into work fast or somehow avoid seeing/hearing women. When you're trying to get work done, it's really annoying.

The most jarring thing about eating meth, there is no comedown. It's very surreal. I get why they say it's "clean", but it's an illusion and you need to take care of yourself before you slip into insanity (mania).

disclaimer: look you can do whatever with your life, but please... if anything never ever ever ever inject meth; you will kill your kidneys, and if you dont you will enlarge and permanently damage your heart. Don't do it ever please. That being said I only read about it, I never did it myself. I only eat it (Oral ROA).

62008763

62008812

IDK guys I trust this handsome Indian. Think I’m gonna call him so I can buy more crypto.

62008830

Took me a second and then I spit out my tea

62008870
>>61994920
Doubt. How does a jogger set up a trading account? They don’t even use the internet. Maybe he figured out the Robinhood app, zi guess I could believe that.

62011444

62011547

62013202
>>62011547

62014464

wasn't there a dude mining in a hotel room?

62014602

it's happened a few times, it will happen again,

62016016

62016089
>>61970825

62016097

I think he won again and lost it again

62017377
>>62013277
czech'd, those are a nice pair of baloney tits he's got there

62017905
>>62016016
maxkek.

I bow.

62019895
>>61994238
Who has the george floyd i cant leave ? kek

62019909
>>61997816
Now i know why linkies stays stinky.

62019923
>>62016016
Thanks for the pasta.

Many good pastas in this bake anons.

item.title: THIS RETARD IS NEVER RIGHT LMAO HOW THE FUCK DOES HE DO IT I AM REALLY FUCKING BORN IN THE WRONG COUNTRY IF A RETARD LIK… — 16 replies — 5.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
THIS RETARD IS NEVER RIGHT LMAO HOW THE FUCK DOES HE DO IT I AM REALLY FUCKING BORN IN THE WRONG COUNTRY IF A RETARD LIK…

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-03-24 04:45 UTC

OP

THIS RETARD IS NEVER RIGHT LMAO

HOW THE FUCK DOES HE DO IT

I AM REALLY FUCKING BORN IN THE WRONG COUNTRY IF A RETARD LIKE THIS IS A MULTI MILLIONAIRE

Early replies (first 3)

62023019
He was early with bitcoin, created bitmex and is a billionaire
I agree with the rest

62023037
>>62023019
ALSO PLEASE REFRAIN FROM LINKING HIS MENTAL CAPABILITIES TO HIS RACE. WE AREN'T RACISTS ON /BIZ/

62023048
his advice is obviously not meant for poortards like you, only people who can afford to play and lose, so you are the retard for blindly following it

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62023088
>>62023019
this.
He actually wan't even that early, he didn't get into bitcoin until 2013, and he found a way to arb BTC between china and singapore, he was literally buying in singapore, selling on a chinese exchange, going to china, taking cash out of bank, then going back to singapore, deposting in bank, repeat.
This was major commitment, but he made millions just doing this.
then he created bitmex and HE created the thing we all know as a PERP. Its actually his invention which is pretty insane.
now all his calls are bad, i don't think he has been right on any call in years.

62023316
>>62023012
He takes the opposite trade of what he says.

62023338
>>62023012
He's the only reason I am not buying HYPE.

62023415
>>62023012
he made his gorillions as an entrepreneur being at the right place at the right time i.e. Creating a successful product and exchange (he pioneered perpetual contracts).

That being said, you can't blindly follow someone in on XYZ just because he was successful doing ABC.

He can afford to be wrong, but he also has demonstrated to be just another retard like you and me when it comes to investing.

Just like rich dad poor dad guy that made his millions out of selling a book, get it now?

62023587
>>62023088
>HE created the thing we all know as a PERP. Its actually his invention which is pretty insane.
Perpetuals were invented in an academic paper years prior; BitMEX just had the first practical implementation

62023672
>>62023107
>>62023316
This..also, to be fair, you need a really high iq to understand his posts.

62023810
>>62023587
This lol anon actually thought a nigger invented something

62024014
that's one fucking ugly nigger

62024329
>>62023012
>the only black man in crypto
>be a criminal
pottery kek

62024857
>>62023012
lol, lmao

62024862
Even though I LOVE perps, it's one of the worst things to happen to crypto. Even worse than the shitcoin Factory that was eth

62024886
>>62023810
timmy boy salty a black man is richer than he is

item.title: IMPENDING FINANCIAL RESET!!!! AAAAAHHHHHHH!!!!!!!!!!! — 9 replies — 5.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
IMPENDING FINANCIAL RESET!!!! AAAAAHHHHHHH!!!!!!!!!!!

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-03-24 06:00 UTC

OP

What are we supposed to do again? I can't remember what people said since it was a while ago. You know the whole reevaluate gold, clarity act, genius act trick that's going to get rid of the US debt? It seems like the Iran conflict is the opening to the transition. Some pointers/help anyone? Are we supposed to just buy bitcoin, lol

Early replies (first 3)

62023495
>>62023480
Idk, people keep saying "trust the plan," but they never say what that plan is. I'm starting to think it's another retarded /biz/ buzz word, and it really is every man for himself. Buying gold and burying it personally seems rational.

62023499
Just dance, gonna be ok

62023655
>>62023495
They're definitely intentionally demolishing the petro dollar right now. I think we have until the China Summit next month.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62025006
>>62023480
close your eyes and repeat: BLUE EISENHOWER NOVEMBER

62025022
>>62025006
does nothin really never happen??

62025026
>>62023480
this is going to make the great depression look like the 1990s.

62025033
>>62023480
you can do nothing, it's neofeudalism time, unless you have your mercenary army you are nothing

62025036
>>62023480
Chainlink resets us

62025039
>>62023480
And it’s re-valuation retard. Not re-evaluate.
